Hero.Title: How SafeScan uses your profile.
Hero.Description: SafeScan compares product data against the allergens selected in the currently active profile.

Selection.Title: How allergen selection works
Selection.ParagraphOne: Each profile stores its own allergen selection. You can switch profiles from the top-right menu when different family members need different checks.
Selection.ParagraphTwo: Profiles can be saved without any allergens selected. In that case, the app stays usable, but result warnings are not personalized until allergens are added.

Responses.Title: What the responses mean
Responses.Safe: Safe: no selected allergens were found in the available product data.
Responses.MayContain: May contain: a trace warning or precautionary statement was found for one of the selected allergens.
Responses.Contains: Contains: a selected allergen was found in the available product data.
Responses.Unknown: Unknown: the product data was incomplete, conflicting, or not detailed enough for a confident answer.

BeforeBuy.Title: Before you buy
BeforeBuy.Description: SafeScan is designed to speed up checking, but the package label remains the final source of truth if product data is missing or unclear.
